title: La marcia su Roma
writer: Agenore Incrocci, Ruggero Maccari, Sandro Continenza
actors: Vittorio Gassman, Ugo Tognazzi, Roger Hanin
plot: After the 1st world war, two veterans, starving, but fools, are enlisted with the fascists, where they can eat. But when it comes to killing, they drop out.
